languages.original_text: "It is rather more crowded in here. And the smell of blood... Ah, forgive me, I'm feeling slightly ill."

languages.text: "Здесь стало люднее. И запах крови... Ах, прошу прощения, мне немного дурно".
"It is rather more crowded in here. And the smell of blood... Ah, forgive me, I'm feeling slightly ill."
languages.original_text: "Здесь стало люднее. И запах крови... Ах, прошу прощения, мне немного дурно".

traits.locale_text: "It is rather more crowded in here. And the smell of blood... Ah, forgive me, I'm feeling slightly ill."
"It is rather more crowded in here. And the smell of blood... Ah, forgive me, I'm feeling slightly ill."
"It is rather more crowded in here. And the smell of blood... Ah, forgive me, I'm feeling slightly ill."

languages.text: 「ここはやや混雑しています。そして血の匂い…ああ、許してください、私は少し気分が悪いです」
languages.original_text: "It is rather more crowded in here. And the smell of blood... Ah, forgive me, I'm feeling slightly ill."

traits.locale_text: 「ここはやや混雑しています。そして血の匂い…ああ、許してください、私は少し気分が悪いです。」

languages.text: « Il y a beaucoup plus de monde qu'avant, et l'odeur du sang... Ah, pardonnez-moi, je ne me sens pas très bien. »
languages.original_text: "It is rather more crowded in here. And the smell of blood... Ah, forgive me, I'm feeling slightly ill."

traits.locale_text: « Il y a beaucoup plus de monde qu'avant, et l'odeur du sang... Ah, pardonnez-moi, je ne me sens pas très bien. »

languages.text: "Hier ist etwas mehr los. Und der Geruch von Blut ... Ah, tut mir leid, ich fühle mich ein wenig krank."
languages.original_text: "It is rather more crowded in here. And the smell of blood... Ah, forgive me, I'm feeling slightly ill."

traits.locale_text: "Hier ist etwas mehr los. Und der Geruch von Blut ... Ah, tut mir leid, ich fühle mich ein wenig krank."

languages.text: "Burası biraz daha kalabalık. Bir de kan kokusu... Kusura bakmayın, biraz kötü hissediyorum."
languages.original_text: "It is rather more crowded in here. And the smell of blood... Ah, forgive me, I'm feeling slightly ill."

traits.locale_text: "Burası biraz daha kalabalık. Bir de kan kokusu... Kusura bakmayın, biraz kötü hissediyorum."

languages.text: «Esto está bastante más concurrido. Y huele mucho a sangre... Ay, perdón, me siento un poco indispuesta».
languages.original_text: "It is rather more crowded in here. And the smell of blood... Ah, forgive me, I'm feeling slightly ill."

traits.locale_text: «Esto está bastante más concurrido. Y huele mucho a sangre... Ay, perdón, me siento un poco indispuesta».

languages.text: “这里的确更拥挤了。而且这股血腥味……啊，请见谅，我有点不适。”
languages.original_text: "It is rather more crowded in here. And the smell of blood... Ah, forgive me, I'm feeling slightly ill."

traits.locale_text: “这里的确更拥挤了。而且这股血腥味……啊，请见谅，我有点不适。”
